label: strong

card.title: slugify() helper for URL-safe identifiers
card.description: Convert arbitrary titles into lowercase, hyphenated, URL-safe slugs.
card.technicalNotes: Pure, no deps. Lowercase, strip diacritics, collapse non-alphanumerics to single hyphen, trim leading/trailing hyphens. Tested.
isc: Exports slugify(input) returning a lowercase hyphenated string
Collapses runs of non-alphanumeric characters into a single hyphen
Tests cover spaces, punctuation, and accented characters

iscVerdicts.criterion: Exports slugify(input) returning a lowercase hyphenated string
Collapses runs of non-alphanumeric characters into a single hyphen
Tests cover spaces, punctuation, and accented characters
